subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Kingdom Divine! Beseech thou God that He may vouchsafe unto thee success and confirmation in a matter that, even as a star [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر بملکوت الهی از خدا بخواه که ترا بامری موفق و موید فرماید که چون ستاره
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @service to others; to the Cause of God
